archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) adapted for iOS Native App
design_philosophy: Instagram/Facebook style profile editing. Natural, photo-forward, and easy. A mobile-first premium dark mode with gold and vibrant iOS accents.

cover_photo.overlay: Use a subtle dark gradient at the bottom to ensure the overlapping profile photo and toggle buttons pop.

profile_photo.edit_icon_overlay: Small circular button at the bottom right of the avatar.

inline_editable_fields.behavior: Render as TextInputs but style them seamlessly like Text. Use placeholder text color #8E8E93. Include a small subtle Ionicons 'pencil' icon near the name to indicate editability.

asset_cards.layout: 2-column flex wrap grid (48% width each) with 4% gap.

photo_gallery.layout: 3-column grid, square aspect ratio images. Gap of 2px between images.

collapsible_address.header: Row with title and chevron-down/up icon.
collapsible_address.content: Indented or styled with a left border using accent_gold.

settings_list.row_style: Row layout, icon on left, text in middle, chevron-forward on right. Padding vertical 16px, border-bottom 1px solid #38383A.

cover_photo.description: Dark gold abstract texture for the profile cover banner.

profile_photo.description: Professional high-quality portrait for the main user avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The user strictly requested React Native / Expo Web components. You MUST output JSX using ONLY React Native components: <View>, <Text>, <ScrollView>, <TouchableOpacity>, <TextInput>.

STYLING: Use React Native's StyleSheet API. Do NOT output Tailwind CSS classes (className) on standard elements unless you are 100% sure NativeWind is configured for RN components. Assume standard React Native StyleSheet objects for safety.
The component should look like a mobile-first Instagram/Facebook profile redesign for an A+B hybrid presence view.
Add 'testID' attributes (equivalent to data-testid in RN) to all interactive elements.
